table.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; font-size: 11px; font-family: verdana; vertical-align: top;

tr.style: border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; font-size: 11px; font-family: verdana; vertical-align: top

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px

a.title: The logical name of the element

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px

a.title: Information about the use of the element

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px

a.title: Minimum and Maximum # of times the element can appear in the instance

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px; width: 100px

a.title: Reference to the type of the element

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck1.png)

a.title: Enrollment of the DHIS2 Cancer Registry tracker program. Captures core patient demographic information required to register an individual in the cancer registry, aligned with the IARC standard data requirements for population-based cancer registration. The tracked entity type is 'Person'. The Patient ID is automatically generated at enrollment using the pattern CURRENT_DATE(yyyy)+SEQUENTIAL(####), following the CanReg5 convention.

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: #F7F7F7

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck10.png)

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck10.png)

a.title: Family name or last name of the person or case.

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: #F7F7F7

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck10.png)

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck10.png)

tr.td:
CR - Sex
Binding: CR - Sex value set (required)

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: #F7F7F7

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck10.png)

a.title: Date of birth. This field can also be used when the date of birth is estimated, in conjunction with another attribute that indicates whether the birth date is estimated.

description.value: Enrollment of the DHIS2 Cancer Registry tracker program. Captures core patient demographic information required to register an individual in the cancer registry, aligned with the IARC standard data requirements for population-based cancer registration. The tracked entity type is 'Person'. The Patient ID is automatically generated at enrollment using the pattern CURRENT_DATE(yyyy)+SEQUENTIAL(####), following the CanReg5 convention.

comment.value: Maps the DHIS2 Cancer Registry enrollment tracked-entity attributes to the Patient FHIR profile.
Maps the DHIS2 Cancer Registry enrollment to a CRCancerRegistrationEpisode that groups all stage encounters.

definition.value: Enrollment of the DHIS2 Cancer Registry tracker program. Captures core patient demographic information required to register an individual in the cancer registry, aligned with the IARC standard data requirements for population-based cancer registration. The tracked entity type is 'Person'. The Patient ID is automatically generated at enrollment using the pattern CURRENT_DATE(yyyy)+SEQUENTIAL(####), following the CanReg5 convention.

short.value: Family name or last name of the person or case.

definition.value: Family name or last name of the person or case.

short.value: Given name or first name of the person or case.

definition.value: Given name or first name of the person or case.

comment.value: Sex codes: 1=male, 2=female, 9=unknown → FHIR: male, female, unknown

short.value: Date of birth. This field can also be used when the date of birth is estimated, in conjunction with another attribute that indicates whether the birth date is estimated.

definition.value: Date of birth. This field can also be used when the date of birth is estimated, in conjunction with another attribute that indicates whether the birth date is estimated.

comment.value: Each tumor stage event → a CRTumorEncounter linked via episodeOfCare
Each source event → a CRSourceEncounter linked via episodeOfCare
Each follow-up event → a CRFollowUpEncounter linked via episodeOfCare

definition.value: Enrollment of the DHIS2 Cancer Registry tracker program. Captures core patient demographic information required to register an individual in the cancer registry, aligned with the IARC standard data requirements for population-based cancer registration. The tracked entity type is 'Person'. The Patient ID is automatically generated at enrollment using the pattern CURRENT_DATE(yyyy)+SEQUENTIAL(####), following the CanReg5 convention.

short.value: Family name or last name of the person or case.

definition.value: Family name or last name of the person or case.

short.value: Given name or first name of the person or case.

definition.value: Given name or first name of the person or case.

comment.value: Sex codes: 1=male, 2=female, 9=unknown → FHIR: male, female, unknown

short.value: Date of birth. This field can also be used when the date of birth is estimated, in conjunction with another attribute that indicates whether the birth date is estimated.

definition.value: Date of birth. This field can also be used when the date of birth is estimated, in conjunction with another attribute that indicates whether the birth date is estimated.

comment.value: Each tumor stage event → a CRTumorEncounter linked via episodeOfCare
Each source event → a CRSourceEncounter linked via episodeOfCare
Each follow-up event → a CRFollowUpEncounter linked via episodeOfCare
